meta.title: Zones & Conduits In The Cloud
meta.description:
SCADA in the cloud already exists on the market today, and OT migration to the cloud is unlikely to subside. Dennis presents how Chevron is evaluating where it is appropriate to make the transition from on premises OT to the cloud OT. And for OT in the cloud what is the best way to implement zone and conduit based security.

After a quick review of what zones and conduits looks like in the traditional on-premises environment, Dennis shows how conduits can be built to the Cloud, and finally what those cloud zones and conduits should be designed to allow for the full functionality that is expected, and to meet security and safety expectations.

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
